finding_results.notes: Introduced a damaged-bearing false read that temporarily dislocates the Hogwarts node, forcing Owen to use prior table-work and a correction mark before he trusts the lens; the battle-scale bracket still resolves clearly into breach risk.
finding_results.summary: The activation sequence now earns its conclusion through ambiguity, physical cost, and inference instead of clean stepwise diagnostics.

finding_results.notes: Replaced Owen's abstract secrecy manifesto with practical scheduling logic, anticipated questions from Prue/Neville/Martha, and the work-loss he is choosing over human obligations.
finding_results.summary: Owen now justifies silence through method, time, and interruption pressure, which keeps the ugliness of the choice inside his established evasive register.

summary: Chapter 13 now makes the star-lens discovery harder won and keeps Owen's post-reveal reasoning grounded in emergency labor, procedural evasion, and continuity-safe battle knowledge.
